title: Odder Pack 5
description: A modpack with technology and exploration in deep focus, experience the most popular and some obscured tech mods that allows innovation through automation, and progression through increasingly complex creations through playtime.
body:
# Odder Pack 5
This is the 5th season of our Modpack "Odder Imperiet" just called Odder 5 this time around.
The pack contains mods that cater to the more tech savvy player, no or very few magic mods are included because magic is not a focus of this mocpack, instead we have found the best tech based mods we know, and used them to weave an experience that we suggest best played on a server, this pack was made foruse on our own little private community but, for ease of download and for everyone to enjoy we have decided to release it under our name.

# What is the focus of this pack?
We focus on technology and automation through progression, that includes mods like Create and all its addons as well as Mekanism, a lot of generator mods, power management tools and realism mods that add a flair of wonder to every explorer.

## Expect regular updates
We always try and update our packs to stay up to date with new mods, better configs and ease of use, so stay tuned for updates as we release them.

### Links to featured dependancies
The pack uses Project Red which is a mod updating redstone interactions that is essential to our owriginal server idea, to find the versions we use, check out these links.

**ProjectRed Core**
[Find it here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/project-red-core/files)

**ProjectRed Integration**
[Find it here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/project-red-integration)

**ProjectRed Expansion**

**Quark**
[Find it here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark)
